must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (SFO Part XIVA) — Project Lychee — EMBARGO until 2026-07-15 09:00 HKT — Seabright Holdings Limited (HK-listed) and Blue Peak Harbour Fund V (sponsor).
Board memo excerpt: during confirmatory diligence for the proposed Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) to acquire Vantage Logistics (Project Lychee), Seabright’s outsourced payroll vendor HarbourPay Systems Ltd detected anomalous access on 2026-06-01; preliminary scope suggests limited exposure.
PDPO note: data “relating to a living individual” may include redacted staff profiles (≈142 payroll entries; hashed names and masked HK contact fields) and two contractor e‑mails, with no full ID numbers stored; all notices prepared but not dispatched pending legal review.
SFO/MNPI classification: the incident and any SPA price adjustment are not generally known to persons accustomed to dealing in securities and would be likely to materially affect Seabright’s share price; treat as MNPI until embargo lifts.
Definitive agreements: SPA signing tentatively 2026-07-20; current board view is that no MAE has occurred and this incident, as assessed, does not constitute a MAC/MAE under clause 8.1(b) of the draft Implementation Agreement.
Term sheet impact note: establish an escrow equal to 3.5% of consideration (HKD 18,600,000) for 12 months; acquirer warranty insurance premium to increase by 0.4% (HKD 2,120,000) subject to broker sign-off.
Investor-relations draft (for release post-embargo): Seabright clarifies no customer-facing systems were compromised; operations continue uninterrupted; remediation complete on vendor side.
Research note (internal): TTPs resemble “Malachite” backdoor referenced in CERT‑VH Advisory 2022‑09 and public VEX Circular GL‑2019‑03 on cyber risk disclosure, but we cannot rely on open-source attributions for regulatory filings.
Deal checklist (VEX Listing Rule 13.09 analogue): (i) assess inside information vs. confidentiality safe harbour; (ii) pre-clear with the Exchange; (iii) coordinate SFCH informal consultation; (iv) align fund LPAC notice (Blue Peak Harbour Fund V) with embargo timing.
Technical summary: vendor endpoint hb‑pay‑gw02 (10.8 8 .4 .2 → 10 .8 8 .4 .9) saw credential stuffing 03:14–03:26 HKT; 6 tokens exfiltrated, immediately revoked; no lateral movement in Seabright’s tenant per SOC triage.
Access artefacts: u s e r “a.liu” via hxxps://sec‑v a u l t.seabright‑hk.example/fi/lychee; Acct ref: HK‑**9 3 7**‑X5; EventID E‑0 4 7‑B; file hash 8f2c…d1 (truncated); vendor ticket HP‑IR‑2026‑06‑01.
Public-source reminder: historical 2021 media about similar malware is stale and should not be cited in statutory disclosure.
Contact: Ms. Livia Tam, General Counsel, l.tam@seabright‑hk.example; IR channel: ir@seabright‑hk.example; working link: http://intra.seabright‑hk.example/IR/draft
